name: integration_gov_contract_bja_peer_review_support_s
method: [GOV CONTRACT] BJA PEER REVIEW SUPPORT SERVICES (deadline: 2026-04-17)

phases.name: ingest
steps: hit SAM.gov opportunities API (free, no key needed for public search): GET /opportunities/v2/search?keyword=peer+review+support&postedFrom=today-7d
Playwright fallback: scrape sam.gov/search if API rate-limited

phases.name: score_and_filter
steps: filter: deadline >= 14 days out (enough time to bid)
score: 1-10 on (contract_value_est, past_perf_required=0 bonus, set-aside=small_biz bonus, deadline_urgency)
flag THIS entry: BJA Peer Review deadline 2026-04-17 — score 7, set-aside TBD, no past-performance cited

phases.name: proposal_prep
steps: for score >= 6: call `claude -p` to generate capability statement (500 words, no AI vocab, direct, factual)
populate proposal template: executive summary, approach, key personnel placeholder, price-to-win estimate

phases.name: alert_and_track
steps: if deadline <= 7 days: write urgent alert to OPS/HEARTBEAT.md
update KPI dashboard with pipeline count and nearest deadline
